mapper.sql: announcement_id, teaching_id, college_id, title, create_by, create_time, update_time, del_flag
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_announcement(teaching_id, college_id, title, content, create_by, create_time, update_time, del_flag) values (#{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_announcement
teaching_id,
college_id,
title,
content,
create_by,
create_time,
update_time,
del_flag,

mapper.update:
update biz_announcement
teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where announcement_id = #{announcementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_announcement set teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where announcement_id = #{announcementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_announcement set teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, college_id = #{collegeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where announcement_id = #{announcementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
